name: apiify
description: Turn websites and browser workflows into deterministic API scripts with JSON and CSV outputs.

interface.shortDescription: Convert websites into deterministic API scripts.
interface.longDescription: Apiify guides agents through public/private API discovery, browser-assisted capture, deterministic script generation, verification, and JSON/CSV export.
defaultPrompt: Use Apiify to turn this website workflow into a script and CSV output.
Use Apiify to discover whether this site has a replayable API before using browser automation.
